decision: Single focus until further notice: prove the signal has edge. No new features.

what_was_found.ic_status: IC has never computed real values. All dimensions null, equal weights (1/9 each) since day one. Root cause: IC calculator takes last 60 signals_log records which are always 1-2 days old. Forward returns need 6+ days. 185 eligible records exist (March 30th) but are not in the last-60 window. Resolves naturally — check April 9th.
what_was_found.win_rate: 34% across 103 closed trades (35 wins, 68 losses). Trend unknown.
what_was_found.score_anomaly: 102 of 143 trades have score=0 with empty signal_scores. Not yet explained.

dimension_observations.social: Disabled in config, always scores 0 — IC will always be undefined for this dimension
dimension_observations.breakout: 95% zeros in IC-eligible window — near-zero variance, IC unreliable when computed
dimension_observations.news: 28% zeros — acceptable, but was partly broken during Finviz scraper bug period
dimension_observations.short_squeeze: Was silently returning None for all symbols due to Finviz HTML parser mismatch — now fixed

what_was_done_this_session.finnhub_integration: Added finnhub_client.py, wired company-news into news.py Tier 2b, added finnhub_api_key to config and .env. Free tier only covers stock quotes + company news — VIX/short-interest/sentiment are paywalled.
what_was_done_this_session.finviz_scraper_fix: Fixed _fetch_short_float() — old DOM parser returned None for all symbols because Finviz wraps values in <b> tags. New parser handles actual HTML structure. Live tested: GME=15.76%, AAPL=0.85%, NVDA=0.98%.
what_was_done_this_session.strategic_decision: Agreed: stop adding features. Alpha validation is the only gate that matters.

what_to_do_next_session: Check ic_weights.json — if April 9th or later, IC should have real values
Investigate score=0 on 102 trades — is it a logging bug?
Break down win rate by week and by exit_reason
open_questions: Is the 34% win rate improving or flat over time?
Are losses concentrated in options, specific regimes, or specific exit reasons?
What is the score=0 population — sentinel trades, options, logging bug?
